title: Environmental Compliance and Prosecutions Update: Managing Your Risk
content:
## Environmental Compliance and Prosecutions Update: Managing Your Risk
McCarthy Tétrault would like to invite you to a presentation where leading experts will discuss:
- Directors and Officers’ Liability
- Increasing Challenges and Risks Linked to Chemical Substances
- Trends in Environmental Prosecutions
The following speakers will share their expertise:
- Nicholas Hughes , Partner, Co-lead of National Environmental Group, Litigation Group, McCarthy Tétrault LLP
- Cindy Vaillancourt , Partner, Co-lead of National Environmental Group, Business Law Group, McCarthy Tétrault LLP
- Kimberly Howard , Partner, Co-lead of National Environmental Group, Business Law, McCarthy Tétrault LLP
- Selina Lee-Andersen , Partner, Business Law Group, McCarthy Tétrault LLP
- Cassidy Bishop , Associate, Litigation Group, McCarthy Tétrault LLP
- Alexander Steele , Associate, Labour & Employment Group, McCarthy Tétrault LLP
Note: Detailed instructions on accessing the webinar will be sent to you shortly before the event date.
For legal professionals seeking CPD accreditation, this program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Members of the Barreau du Québec can also benefit, as this program includes up to 1.5 hours of educational content. For more information on declaring and recognizing educational activities, please consult the Barreau du Québec .
If you have questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
We look forward to your participation in what promises to be an informative and engaging event.
- Nicholas Hughes Partner People.Offices.Singular Vancouver
People.Offices.Singular Vancouver
- Cindy Vaillancourt Partner People.Offices.Plural Montréal, Québec City
